title: How to Play
introduction: Figure out the song from our highly questionable scribbles.

sections.heading: Study the scribbles
sections.body: Guess the song of the day by deciphering the clue & some world-class hand drawings.

sections.heading: Take your best shot
sections.body: Five Guesses and a Reveal Artist button. Can you decipher the doodles?

panels.alt: A rough drawing of a person being hit in the face.
A rough drawing of a baby with a dummy.
A rough drawing of the number one.
A rough drawing of a clock.
